actors.name: APT28
actors.description: Russian state-sponsored threat actor associated with the GRU. Known for cyber-espionage targeting government, military, and political organizations.

actors.name: APT29
actors.description: Russian state-sponsored threat actor associated with the SVR. Known for sophisticated supply-chain and cloud-focused attacks.

actors.name: Lazarus Group
actors.description: North Korean state-sponsored threat actor known for both espionage and financially motivated attacks including ransomware and cryptocurrency theft.

actors.name: FIN7
actors.description: Financially motivated threat group targeting retail, restaurant, and hospitality sectors. Known for point-of-sale malware and recently for ransomware operations.

actors.name: APT41
actors.description: Chinese state-sponsored threat actor conducting both state-aligned espionage and financially motivated operations targeting healthcare, telecom, and tech sectors.
